steps.n: Character creation complete — spawn inside the ruined chapel. Pre-tutorial area, no Site of Grace here yet.

Scripted scare-encounter. Win OR loss both advance the game via the same cutscene. Wretch should die intentionally — the fight is unwinnable at base stats and the ledge collapses either way. Skilled players can cheese a win for 3,200 runes + Ornamental Straight Sword + Golden Beast Crest Shield, but level 1 Wretch cannot realistically execute it.

Walk onto the ledge with the second Nascent Butterfly. The ground crumbles, killing the player and transitioning to Stranded Graveyard. Do NOT jump or reload after a Grafted Scion win (rune-loss bug).

Scripted weak Wandering Nobles and Godrick Soldiers placed for backstab/combat practice. Drop minor runes, zero risk.
Hanging corpse mid-tutorial. Gesture unlock — trivial pickup.
First Stake of Marika — outside the boss fog gate. Acts as respawn point for the boss fight so death does not kick you back to the SoG.
Scripted tutorial boss, ~400 runes. Wretch wins easily — this is the intended first kill.
Corpse near the exit stairs. Finger Severer = dismiss summons. Furled Fingers = co-op summon signs. On the path, no detour.

Exiting the lift triggers the iconic Erdtree reveal cutscene. No mechanical effect — orientation moment.
First outdoor Site of Grace. Rest here to enable fast travel once other graces are found.

Standing on the path ~10m from First Step SoG. 'Maidenless' dialogue, points the player toward Stormveil/Godrick. Gives no items on first meeting. Exhaust dialogue for questline flag (his quest unlocks Mohgwyn Palace access later — second rune farm).

PHASE 0: DO NOT ENGAGE. Mounted halberd boss patrolling the road northeast of First Step. Unwinnable at level 1 Wretch. Hug the cliffs/trees on the west side of the road to sneak past. Post-Greyoll cleanup target — Golden Halberd is a strong STR/FTH weapon.
Various Golden Runes scattered along the road from First Step toward Church of Elleh. Grab any glowing items visible while avoiding Tree Sentinel. Low priority, no detour.
Ruined church north of First Step. Second outdoor Site of Grace. Fast-travel network now viable between First Step and Elleh.
Single Smithing Stone [1] sitting on the smithing table next to Kalé. Free pickup.

Self-service weapon upgrades up to +3 with Smithing Stone [1]. No blacksmith needed for low tiers. You will return here at step 39 to upgrade Morning Star to +3 before Greyoll. Total cost per Fextralife: 12 Smithing Stone [1] (breakdown 2/4/6 per level).

Seated at campfire. Phase 0 essential purchases: Crafting Kit (300r), Torch (200r), Nomadic Warrior's Cookbook [1] (500r). ~1,000 runes total. Defer Cookbook [2], Missionary's Cookbook, armor sets, and pots until runes are abundant.
Sold by Kalé for 300 runes. PHASE 0 ESSENTIAL — enables all crafting (per DD36). Buy immediately.
Sold by Kalé for 200 runes. PHASE 0 ESSENTIAL — needed for caves and catacombs vision (per DD36).
Sold by Kalé for 500 runes. Unlocks basic crafting recipes (throwing knives, Rowa Raisins, etc.).

Map fragment at the pillar in the center of Gatefront Ruins. Reveals West Limgrave on the map. Sneak around the perimeter (Godrick Soldiers + Knights — Knights are dangerous for level 1 Wretch) to grab it.

Underground chamber accessed via stairs inside the ruins. Whetstone Knife enables Ash of War application to weapons (critical for build). Storm Stomp = first Ash of War, heavy-attack wave projectile. Both on a corpse in the cellar.

Chest on a hearse guarded by a Godrick Soldier. Standard STR/DEX greatsword (16 STR / 10 DEX), D/D scaling. Free pickup — grab in passing. Cannot wield meaningfully at Wretch level 1; useful AFTER Greyoll farm for STR/quality archetypes.
Second hearse chest contains a Flail (10 STR / 18 DEX). DO NOT prioritize — Morning Star (step 36) is strictly better (+2 STR vs +8 DEX). Open chest for completionism only.
Site of Grace on the north side of the ruins, on the road to Stormveil. PHASE 0 TERMINAL SITE — first rest here triggers the Melina cutscene.
Appears on first rest at Gatefront. Offers to be your Finger Maiden in exchange for accompaniment. ACCEPT — this enables rune spending for level-ups at Sites of Grace. Mandatory for progression.

Granted by Melina at Gatefront. Whistle summons Torrent, the spectral steed. Mounted travel + mounted combat unlocked. Prologue midpoint — continue to step 34 for Renna, then south to the Morning Star run.

steps.i: Renna at Church of Elleh (at night)
steps.n: Warp back to Church of Elleh. At night, Renna appears on the broken wall. Exhaust dialogue. Grants Spirit Calling Bell (unlocks spirit ash summoning slot) + Lone Wolf Ashes. Permanent capability unlock — do this BEFORE leaving for Weeping Peninsula. ~2 minute detour.

steps.i: Cross Bridge of Sacrifice → Weeping Peninsula
steps.n: Ride Torrent south from Gatefront → Agheel Lake → Bridge of Sacrifice. Activate the Bridge of Sacrifice Site of Grace as a warp point (on the bridge itself). Continue across the bridge into Weeping Peninsula. Your target: the wrecked carriage chest on the main road just south of the bridge.

PHASE 0 KEY WEAPON. Inside a chest in a wrecked carriage on the main road, just south of Bridge of Sacrifice SoG. Morning Star (12 STR / 8 DEX) — strike damage + innate bleed (50 base buildup). Wields with only +2 STR from Wretch base (level 1→3). Strike type kills smithing-stone miners; innate bleed procs Greyoll. ONE weapon serves the entire forced prologue. No combat required — just open the chest.

steps.i: Warp back to Agheel Lake North
steps.n: After Morning Star pickup, do NOT continue south into Weeping Peninsula (Morne Tunnel detour is wasted time for a Phase 0 Wretch). Warp back to Agheel Lake North SoG (or any West Limgrave SoG with a clear path). Your target: Limgrave Tunnels, northwest part of Agheel Lake.

Enter Limgrave Tunnels. PHASE 0 FARM TARGET: 11 Smithing Stone [1] (combined with the 1 from Church of Elleh anvil at step 21 = 12 total, the exact cost to upgrade Morning Star from +0 to +3). SOURCES inside the tunnel: 9 fixed Smithing Stone [1] pickups (ore deposits on the walls + corpses), plus drops from strike-vulnerable miner enemies (Morning Star handles them — 8-10 miners throughout the dungeon). If miner drops come up short, you will have 10 stones = enough for Morning Star +2 (same Greyoll hit count as +3, the bleed knee is at +4 so +2 vs +3 is a physical-chip difference only — viable fallback). DO NOT engage Stonedigger Troll boss — defer to post-commit. Skip the Roar Medallion drop — archetype-specific (STR/Roar builds only).

steps.i: Upgrade Morning Star +3 + Level Up 2 STR at Church of Elleh
steps.n: Warp to Church of Elleh SoG. TWO ACTIONS: (1) Use the Smithing Table to upgrade Morning Star +0 → +3 using 12 Smithing Stone [1] (cost breakdown per Fextralife: +0→+1 = 2 stones, +1→+2 = 4 stones, +2→+3 = 6 stones). (2) Rest at the Site of Grace, select 'Level Up', put 2 points into STRENGTH (Wretch base 10 → 12). This meets Morning Star's 12 STR requirement and unlocks full D-rank STR scaling. Cost: 1,362 runes total (673 for level 2, 689 for level 3) — trivial by this point from enemy kills in the Limgrave Tunnels farm. EXPECTED AR POST-UPGRADE (verified against actual in-game equipment panel, Wretch level 3 @ 12 STR / 10 DEX): 1H Physical = 154 (base 138 + scaling 16), 2H Physical = 161 (base 138 + scaling 23, +50% STR bonus → effective 18 STR), Bleed buildup = 52. Verify these on your in-game weapon stats screen before continuing. Note: the 2 STR investment is mandatory — NOT the general 'save runes for archetype' rule. After this, save all remaining runes for the post-Greyoll archetype commitment.

steps.i: Third Church of Marika pickups + Portal to Bestial Sanctum
steps.n: Warp to Third Church of Marika SoG in East Limgrave. FIRST collect three permanent pickups inside the ruins near the Marika statue: (1) Sacred Tear — use at any SoG → Flasks → Add Sacred Tear to boost Crimson/Cerulean Flask potency; (2) Flask of Wondrous Physick — permanent third flask slot, first time available this run; (3) Crimson Crystal Tear — mix into the Physick at any SoG (Mix Wondrous Physick) for an instant 50% max HP restore on consumption (per Fextralife), effectively a 4th heal for Greyoll transit and later bosses. THEN go to the creek behind the church and enter the glowing red portal. Deposits you immediately in front of the Bestial Sanctum door in Dragonbarrow (no enemies blocking — verified in-game). Open the door and walk in. The Site of Grace is right-hand side upon entry — rest there to register it for fast travel (mandatory — you will warp back here for the Greyoll farm loop). Gurranq, the Beast Clergyman in the back of the room, is peaceful on first visit (only becomes hostile after turning in a 4th Deathroot, irrelevant for Phase 0) — ignore him.

steps.i: Ride Torrent to Fort Faroth via Farum Greatbridge
steps.n: From Bestial Sanctum SoG, mount Torrent and exit the building. Head SOUTHEAST on the road. WAYPOINTS (live-verified 2026-04-17): (a) Golden Seed drop on a tree alongside the road — dismount briefly to grab it (permanent flask charge upgrade candidate). (b) Farum Greatbridge SoG sits on the LEFT-HAND side at the approach to the bridge — rest to register it for fast travel. (c) On the bridge itself, FLYING DRAGON GREYLL (NOTE: different enemy than Elder Dragon GREYOLL, the rune farm target) is patrolling — SPRINT past on Torrent, DO NOT ENGAGE. (d) Past the bridge, continue on the road to a Minor Erdtree (large tree with golden leaves). (e) Directly behind the Minor Erdtree is a spiritspring — jump from it while facing SOUTHWEST. (f) You will land in south Caelid near Fort Faroth. Fort Faroth SoG sits at the BOTTOM OF THE STAIRS leading up to the fort (about 100m south of the landing) — rest there. This SoG is your operating base for Phase 0 step 42 (Greyoll farm, further SW) and the optional Radagon's Soreseal pickup inside the fort.

steps.i: Elder Dragon Greyoll — Mounted Bleed Farm Loop ×3
steps.n: PHASE 0 RUNE FARM TARGET. From Fort Faroth SoG, head NW approximately 50 yards to the tail-end of Elder Dragon Greyoll (the massive sleeping dragon — NOT Flying Dragon Greyll from the bridge). Greyoll is immobile and only attacks with her head; striking the tail/body from the rear takes ZERO damage. STRATEGY (live-verified 2026-04-17): stay MOUNTED on Torrent, strike the dragon with Morning Star R1 (1H from horseback, 154 physical AR at 12 STR / 10 DEX). Watch her HP bar — a BLEED PROC will occasionally chunk ~15% of her max HP (roughly 7 procs needed, ~17 hits per proc → ~119 hits to kill). Per-hit physical damage is negligible; the kill is driven entirely by bleed. When she dies her tail twitches and she roars. IMMEDIATELY sprint back on Torrent to Fort Faroth SoG and REST — you must reach the SoG before her corpse despawns, or the respawn will not trigger. If you rest in time, Greyoll respawns and the farm loop continues indefinitely. Each kill drops 50,000 runes + 5 Dragon Hearts (Fextralife verified — earlier 80K figure was wrong, which conflated the kill with the 5 lesser dragons you don't hit while mounted-tail-farming). RECOMMENDED: 3 kills = 150,000 runes. From Wretch L1, the curve is: 1 kill → L33 (+32), 2 kills → L44 (+11), 3 kills → L51 (+7), 4 kills → L55 (+4). Kill 4 is the real drop-off — STOP at 3. Do NOT level up between kills — bank all runes for the archetype commitment in step 43. Wretch level 3 holding 150K → ~level 51 after allocation (Margit-comfort target). POST-PHASE-0 RETURN VALUE: this farm stays viable as a quick-runes spot whenever you need to buy from merchants or pad levels, until you unlock the Varre-questline Mohgwyn Palace (Palace Approach Ledge-Road) farm — Mohgwyn's runes/hour is 5-10x higher once accessible.

PHASE 0 COMPLETE. You are Wretch level 3 (from the 2 STR investment at step 39) holding ~150,000 runes from 3 Greyoll kills. Warp to a safe SoG. Commit to your chosen archetype in the My Stats tab (Pure STR, Pure DEX, Quality, Pure INT, Pure FAI, STR/INT, STR/FAI, DEX/INT, DEX/FAI, DEX/ARC, INT/FAI, FAI/ARC, INT/ARC — pick what matches your playstyle). Then use the Stat Optimizer panel to allocate the runes across your chosen archetype's primary stats for optimal effective damage against the next mandatory boss (Margit). Spending all 150K runes will put you at approximately level 51. The REAL GAME begins now — your first post-commitment objective is Radagon's Soreseal (already conveniently next to you at Fort Faroth) which is now feasible because you have stats to fight/sprint through the rat chamber. F8 backlog item (Post-Greyoll Stat Allocation Optimizer) will eventually formalize this step — for now, use the existing Stat Optimizer manually.
